free_text: Elastic scattering of He-3 by Be-9 and  Si-28.
Four surface barrier ORTEC semiconductor
detectors. All the detectors were mounted radially with
respect to the target at a 20 degr. spacing.
Targets were prepared by evaporation of beryllium from
tantalum boat onto thin silver foils. Typical targets
were 15 keV thick for 1 MeV He-3.
Statistical error
* Errors arising from the finite size of the beam
spot, target position and detector solid angle were
negligible.
REACTION code in Sub 005 was changed.
ERR-ANALYS code in Sub 001-004,006 was changed; METHOD
code in Sub 001 was added. DETECTOR code in Sub 001
was changed.
SD: Data were re-digitized.
